title: hordeum maritimum var. gussoneanum
intro: Hordeum maritimum var. gussoneanum, also known as Sea Barley or Marram Grass, is a subspecies of the coastal barley plant (Hordeum maritimum) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar levels and improve digestion. The health benefits of Sea Barley include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving insulin sensitivity, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes added to food products, such as soups and salads, to take advantage of its nutritional benefits.
